business_objective.summary: A wholesale supplier of industrial cleaning products needed to establish relationships with warehouse and logistics facility managers in California. The focus was on facilities managers and operations directors who control large-scale supply purchases.
business_objective.goal: Warehouse and logistics facilities in California to book meetings with facilities managers and operations directors.

target_profile.geographic_scope: California: Los Angeles, San Francisco Bay Area, San Diego, Sacramento metropolitan areas

communication_flow: Verified warehouse and logistics facility list created (facility type, size-based filtering)
Decision-maker roles identified (facilities managers, operations directors, warehouse managers)
Location + persona targeted visibility (industrial B2B platforms, LinkedIn, industry-specific targeting)
Platform expansion (LinkedIn for facilities managers, Google Ads for industrial supply searches)
Direct outreach escalation (bulk pricing offers, facility assessment consultation emails)

list_size.note: Verified warehouse and logistics facilities with verified addresses

decision_maker_coverage.note: Percentage of facilities with identified decision-makers

meeting_requests.note: Meeting requests from facilities managers and operations directors

timeframe_days.note: Time from campaign start to first meeting bookings

additional_metrics.internal_note: Lower response rate but higher deal value. Facilities managers more difficult to reach but more valuable when engaged.

notes: Internal use only. Real performance ranges. Used for product development decisions regarding industrial/logistics sector targeting features. Not for external sharing due to specific metrics.
